sp_widget.name: CS Portal - Space Detail
sp_widget.template:
{{c.data.message}}

{{c.data.space.name}}

{{c.data.space.status}}

{{c.data.space.description}}

Space Information

  • Address {{c.data.space.address}}
  • Capacity {{c.data.space.capacity}}
  • Environment {{c.getEnvironment()}}
  • Type {{c.data.space.space_type}}
